batch_summary: Pete enters an MMA cage fight, supported by Monica and Ross, but is quickly and brutally defeated by a much larger opponent. Afterward, a bruised Pete sits in the empty arena with Monica. While Monica expresses her pride and hopes he can move on with no regrets, Pete shocks her by refusing to quit. Despite her concerns about his safety, Pete compares his fighting ambition to his past tech failures, determined to continue until he becomes the Ultimate Fighting Champion.
cumulative_summary: Pete steps into an octagonal cage for an intense MMA match, cheered on by Monica and Ross. However, the fight quickly turns disastrous as a much larger opponent dominates Pete, hoisting him upside down and pinning him against the fence until he passes out. In the aftermath, a heavily bruised and swollen Pete sits in the empty arena. Monica comforts him, expressing how proud she is of his courage and suggesting he can now move on with no regrets. To her dismay, Pete reveals he has no intention of quitting. When Monica points out the physical danger, reminding him that his opponent stood on his neck, Pete remains undeterred. He compares his current fighting struggles to his long, failure-ridden journey to develop his software, Moss 865. Driven by stubborn determination, Pete vows to keep fighting until he achieves his dream of becoming the Ultimate Fighting Champion, leaving Monica deeply concerned.

batch_summary: Pete promises Monica he will improve quickly, jokingly mentioning his trainer's theory that her ringside presence distracted him. Later, at a rooftop barbecue, Monica anxiously awaits Pete's next fight, learning his opponent is terrifyingly brutal. Meanwhile, Ross happily shares with Phoebe that his date with Bonnie went surprisingly well and they are seeing each other again. As the fight is about to begin on television, the friends prepare to watch.

batch_summary: At the barbecue, Chandler announces an experiment to stop his boss, Doug, from slapping his butt. The next day at work, Chandler tries to get on Doug's bad side by admitting he didn't do his work, but Doug slaps his backside anyway. Forced to be direct, Chandler awkwardly explains that he is uncomfortable with the physical contact, citing his "sensitive posterior." Doug appreciates his honesty and agrees to stop.

batch_summary: After Chandler's awkward encounter with Doug ends on a lighter note, the focus shifts to Rachel and Phoebe. While out at night, Rachel is shocked to spot Ross through the Central Perk window kissing Bonnie, his new bald love interest. Realizing it is a successful second date rather than a breakup, Rachel panics and blames Phoebe for setting them up. When Phoebe questions Rachel's jealousy since she was the one who ended things with Ross, a vulnerable Rachel admits she simply did not expect him to move on and be happy so quickly.

batch_summary: After a brief, lighthearted moment where Phoebe comforts a distraught Rachel on the street, the focus shifts to Pete's severe injuries. Pete is in a full upper-body cast and neck brace but stubbornly refuses to quit his MMA pursuit, claiming he must become the Ultimate Fighter. Unable to bear watching him destroy himself, Monica delivers a painful ultimatum: if he continues fighting, she cannot stay with him. Pete refuses to compromise his identity, leaving their relationship at a devastating standstill.

After Phoebe comforts a distraught Rachel, the focus shifts back to Pete, who is now hospitalized in a full upper-body cast and neck brace. Despite his severe injuries, Pete remains stubbornly committed to becoming the Ultimate Fighter. Deeply distressed and unable to watch him destroy himself, Monica begs him to stop. When Pete refuses, stating that quitting would mean being someone he is not, Monica delivers a heartbreaking ultimatum: if he continues fighting, he will have to do it without her.

batch_summary: Monica officially walks out on Pete, leaving him in his hospital bed after he humorously asks her to leave a note due to his painkiller-induced memory loss. Meanwhile, Chandler caves to peer pressure at work, ultimately asking his boss, Doug, for a butt-slap to feel included. Later, the friends gather to watch Pete's next fight on television, where Monica and Rachel watch in horror as Pete's stubbornness leads to another brutal defeat.

batch_summary: As the friends watch Pete's brutal MMA match on television, the opponent targets Pete's groin. Phoebe makes a naive remark about the opponent's "favorite area," while Ross points out the dark irony that Monica's ex, Richard, didn't want kids, and now Pete physically won't be able to have them. Monica turns away in distress as the rest of the group winces in horror at the ongoing beating.
